faq.q1: How can you be cheaper and still more relevant?

faq.q2: What if a candidate does not have a perfect CV?
faq.a2: We evaluate skills and context of experience. CV style is not the main signal.
faq.q3: How do you measure response quality?
faq.a3: We track impressions, detail opens, responses, and other funnel signals.
faq.q4: Does it work without AI assessment?
faq.a4: Yes. Better relevance and conversion already come from core matching and behavior signals.
faq.q5: How do you handle data protection?
faq.a5: We use controlled data access and transparent logging of key recommendation steps.

demo_handshake.challenge_body: The team keeps passing incomplete information and operations slow down. The company wants to see your first step, trade-off, and validation approach.
demo_handshake.role_truth_1: Hardest part: stabilize shift handoffs without creating more friction.
demo_handshake.role_truth_2: Typical failure: fast assumptions without field validation.
demo_handshake.role_truth_3: The company commits to a clear status instead of silent waiting.
demo_handshake.prompt_one: What is your first move in the first 7 days to reduce shift handoff errors?
demo_handshake.prompt_two: You hit a speed-vs-quality priority conflict. How do you decide and what do you communicate to the team?

demo_handshake.first_reply_candidate_1: I would first audit cross-shift handoffs and introduce one shared checklist.
demo_handshake.first_reply_company_2: That is exactly our issue. We want to continue the dialogue.
demo_handshake.state_rule_body: A new active dialogue unlocks only after both sides respond. No response closes the thread.
demo_handshake.completed_body: This is how first contact works in JobShaman: short, private, and explicit states instead of uncertainty.
demo_handshake.prefilled_answer_one: In week one I would map shift handoff quality across two pilot shifts. I would introduce a lightweight checklist with clear ownership and track incomplete handoffs.
demo_handshake.prefilled_answer_two: If speed conflicts with quality, I would prioritize safe and repeatable handoff first. I would communicate the short-term trade-off and review impact after 14 days.

skill_first.title: Skill-first hiring
skill_first.item_1: The candidate shows concrete thinking, not just a list of keywords.
skill_first.item_2: The company publishes a real problem, expectations, and how the response will be evaluated.
skill_first.item_3: The first contact continues as a live dialogue, not an anonymous CV queue.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.copy: A shared view of open roles, candidates, and decision steps in one place.

assessment.title: Assessment Center
assessment.copy: The company defines exactly what work and evidence it wants to see so the shortlist is built on a better signal.

dialogue.title: Live dialogue lane
dialogue.copy: The first contact is not a CV drop. Recruiters continue from a concrete candidate response and keep the next step in one thread.

brand.title: Settings / Brand
brand.copy: Your company profile keeps the same narrative, intro, and context across the whole hiring flow.

step_1.title: 1. The company defines the evidence
step_1.copy: In Assessment Center, your team decides what the candidate should actually show: a decision, work sample, reasoning, or response to a situation.

step_2.title: 2. The candidate responds to a concrete prompt
step_2.copy: Instead of a blind apply, you get the first relevant material that a recruiter can respond to immediately.

step_3.title: 3. The team decides from a better signal
step_3.copy: The team compares more than resumes. It sees concrete evidence, dialogue status, and readiness for the next step.

pricing.title: Simple pricing without hidden fees

free.label: Free
free.summary: For the first check whether skill-first hiring fits your team in practice.
free.unlock_copy: One active role without risk or upfront investment.
free.feature_3: Good for a pilot on one role

starter.label: Starter
starter.summary: For a smaller team that wants to move from CV chaos to a clearer shortlist.
starter.unlock_copy: Your first repeatable hiring workflow for key roles.
starter.feature_3: Stronger shortlist without blind phone screens

growth.label: Growth
growth.summary: For companies hiring repeatedly and wanting a clear system instead of improvising role by role.
growth.unlock_copy: Enough capacity for ongoing hiring across multiple roles and hiring managers.
growth.feature_3: Strong capacity for shortlist and follow-up

professional.label: Professional
professional.summary: For bigger hiring organizations that need recruiters, managers, and decision speed aligned.
professional.unlock_copy: Broader hiring operations without losing overview or signal quality.
professional.feature_3: Capacity for a larger active pipeline and more decision makers

bottom.what_you_get_copy: Jobshaman helps companies replace ad hoc hiring with a clearer workflow. Instead of sorting CVs by impression, your team gets a stronger shortlist, a better first candidate signal, and a shared context for recruiter and hiring manager.
bottom.low_risk_item_1: The Free plan is enough to verify whether skill-first hiring gives you a better signal than standard CV screening.
bottom.low_risk_item_2: Starter and Growth give teams enough capacity to introduce a repeatable process without changing the entire hiring setup at once.
bottom.low_risk_item_3: If you hire at higher volume or across multiple hiring managers, Professional helps keep visibility and decision speed.

company_landing.pricing_title: Start med en lille pilot. Betal for gentagen brug.
company_landing.pricing_copy: Priserne er vejledende for V2-piloten. Endelige takster kan justeres baseret på volumen, support og integrationer.
company_landing.plan_free_desc: For the first verification of whether skill-first hiring fits you in practice.
company_landing.plan_starter_desc: Til et mindre team, der ønsker at bevæge sig systematisk fra CV-kaos til en tydeligere shortlist.
company_landing.plan_growth_desc: Til virksomheder, der rekrutterer løbende og ønsker et klart system i stedet for improvisation ved hver rolle.
company_landing.plan_pro_desc: Til større rekrutteringsorganisationer, der ønsker at samordne rekrutterere, ledere og beslutningshastighed.
company_landing.faq_q1_copy: Ikke primært. JobShaman håndterer rolledefinitioner, første signaler og teambeslutninger. ATS kan forblive hovedsystemet.
company_landing.faq_q2_title: Skal en kandidat uploade et CV?
company_landing.faq_q2_copy: Nej. Et CV kan hjælpe senere, mas den første interaktion er baseret på et specifikt svar på rollen.
company_landing.faq_q3_copy: I opsætter virksomheden, færdiggør profilen og kan forberede den første rolle eller pilotopgave.
company_landing.footer_title: Forbered din første rolle uden et stort projekt.
company_landing.footer_copy: En pilot kan starte med én stilling og et lille team.
company_landing.outcome2_copy: Role arises from the reality of the team, not from a template full of empty requirements.

legal.last_updated: Disse vilkår er gældende fra 1. maj 2026. Den seneste opdatering blev foretaget i forbindelse med lanceringen af version V2.

profile.jhi_desc_long: Your Job Human Index shows your potential, adaptability and readiness for new challenges.
profile.onboarding_impact_desc: After onboarding, recommendations are not only guided by the role name, but also by how much space you need for meaning, autonomy and creation.
profile.no_experience_cv_desc: There is no experience yet. By uploading a CV, you will complete them automatically.
profile.onboarding_incomplete: Onboarding still needs a few steps to complete
profile.no_documents: There is no document here yet.
profile.skills_placeholder: Skills will appear after completing CV or profile.

identities.architect_desc: Your energy belongs in building systems that connect people, technology and environment. Routine weakens you, complexity charges you.
identities.human_desc: A strong signal points to roles where human impact, system change and ambiguity intersect.
identities.default_desc: AI reads a direction from your onboarding in which you should create, not just execute.

modes.design: System design · innovation tracks · architecture challenges

signals.earthship_body: You arrived at an Earthship-style solution without knowing the existing concept. This is a strong marker of independent systems imagination.
signals.default_body: AI looks for moments in your story when you arrived at unusual but functional solutions independently.

risk.no_autonomy: Roles without autonomy and long-term meaning

strong_zone.complex_design: Complex system design without existing templates
strong_zone.ambiguity: Creating new structures and navigating ambiguity

tasks.questions_desc: It will help us get to know you better

placeholders.signals: Add a few key signals and JobShaman will refine your career identity and recommended roles.
